{{Infobox character
| name = Heaven’s Glory Elder
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory Elder]] has a scarred arm.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory Elder]] uses a [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory Elder]] has a [[jade]] badge.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
